content.en:
The eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse who photographed the incomplete ultimate secret method was the city lord of the Eastern Evil City, known as the Eastern Evil City Lord.

The Eastern Evil City Lord has lived countless years, and before the infinite years, he was already a powerhouse of the eighteenth dimensional limit, and he tried to attack the Ultimate Realm countless times, but he failed.

This time, he successfully auctioned off the incomplete Ultimate Secret Method, and he had the hope of becoming an Ultimate Strongman, so he was naturally extremely excited.

Immediately, he immediately left the auction venue, and then quickly left, wanting to return to his Eastern Evil City.

As a result, as soon as he left Shunyu City, he was on the road of crossing the void in his physical body, and was forced to be beaten down by some eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses.

Rumble!!!!!

The Eastern Evil City Lord was shot down, and immediately stabilized his body and looked at the attacker.

These assailants, who were usually good friends with him, were now attacking him.

"Old Man Changxing. "

"Soul Dao Sect Master!"

"Old Devil Hatoyama!"

"Why did you attack me?"

The East Evil City Lord asked.

"Eastern Evil City Lord, it's very simple, hand over the incomplete ultimate secret method to me!" the old man of Changxing said coldly.

"The Incomplete Ultimate Secret Method 933 will definitely help us break through the Ultimate Strongman, do you really want to fight with me for it?"

The Eastern Evil City Lord said coldly.

"Hahaha, even if it is a crippled ultimate secret method, as long as there is a glimmer of hope, if you don't enter the ultimate powerhouse, no matter how powerful the eighteen-dimensional realm is, you are still a little person like ants. Hatoyama said.

"Kill!"

Three eighteen-dimensional powerhouses attacked and killed the East Evil City Lord.

And there are eighteen-dimensional powerhouses hiding in the shadows, waiting for the opportunity to make a move.

Ye Tian was also watching in secret, and did not make a move immediately.

He is not afraid of these eighteen-dimensional powerhouses, but there is also an ultimate powerhouse in the secret, who has been spied on by copying talent.

What is the attitude of this Ultimate Strength Man, he can't be sure, if he chooses to do it, he must succeed in one blow and snatch the incomplete Ultimate Secret Law Inheritance.

Soon.

There were several eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses who couldn't help but make a move, and they all killed the Eastern Evil Realm Lord.

Burst!!!!!

The body of the Eastern Evil Realm Lord was shattered with a single blow, and a scroll was caught, which was the Incomplete Ultimate Secret Law Inheritance.

However, this eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse who killed the Lord of the Eastern Evil Realm was also quickly hit hard by another eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse.

In this way, this inheritance was snatched and snatched up.

"Can't wait any longer!"

Ye Tian immediately cast the Aurora Escape Killing Move, quickly rushed over, and then cast the Golden Arm Kill, instantly obliterating a top eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse, and then snatched the Ultimate Secret Method that had just arrived in his hand.

"Kill him!"

Many eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses attacked Ye Tian one after another.

Ye Tian became the target of everyone.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian made a brazen move, showing his invincible strength.

Puff puff puff!!!!

A powerhouse of the eighteenth dimension was easily killed by him.

"Ye Tian, it's me, we're friends!"

One of the eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses immediately shouted when he saw that he was about to be killed.

However, Ye Tian didn't spare his hand at all, since this so-called friend did something to him, then don't think about living.

Burst!

This friend of the eighteenth dimensional realm was directly smashed and killed by Ye Tian.

As more and more eighteen-dimensional powerhouses died at Ye Tian's hands, the other eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses were scared and didn't dare to make a move.

Although they all want to break through to the ultimate realm, they don't want to die!

Seeing that these eighteen-dimensional powerhouses didn't dare to do anything to themselves, Ye Tian was about to leave.

And at this time, the ultimate powerhouse who had been hiding in the shadows made a move.

And Ye Tian had already been prepared, he had not been able to exert his full strength, and now that the Ultimate Powerhouse had used a killing move against him, he would no longer hide his strength.

Rumble!!!!!

(chbd) An even more terrifying aura erupted.

"Killing move-Blood!"

The qi and blood in his body continued to burn, which made his own battle a step higher.

"Killer move - Golden Body!"

The whole body defense skyrocketed.

Then he cast a killing move, Aurora Escape, and collided with this ultimate powerhouse with a killing move, the Golden Arm Kill.

Thundered!!!!!

Ye Tian was knocked away, but that Ultimate Perfection was also blown away.

This scene shocked many eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses.

"It's the ultimate powerhouse of Xuanyuan Mountain-the Lord of Dongxi Mountain!"

"How could he snatch the crippled Ultimate Powerhouse?"

"The Xuanyuan Mountain, where the Lord of Dongxi Mountain is located, is an Ultimate Strongman, and the Lord of Dongxi Mountain is able to break through the Ultimate Strongman, and it is said that he also uses the incomplete Ultimate Secret Method to break through. Therefore, he really needs another incomplete ultimate secret method, and it is estimated that he wants to create a complete ultimate secret method to help Xuanyuan Mountain give birth to a second or even third ultimate powerhouse. "

"Shouldn't you be shocked that this eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse named Ye Tian was able to stop the Dongxi Mountain Lord of the Ultimate Realm?"

"Yes, Ye Tian is also in the eighteenth dimensional realm, but in the end, he can fight with the master of Dongxi Mountain, this is too powerful!"

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian was still fighting with the Lord of Dongxi Mountain, and the two sides were almost evenly matched.

Ye Tian was still fighting with the ultimate powerhouse for the first time, and he had to admit that he was still a despised ultimate powerhouse.

The Ultimate Strength far surpasses the Eighteenth Dimensional Strong, and their Ultimate Body is too powerful, but this is still in the process of Polarization, and the Ultimate Perfection has not yet been completely completed.

It is conceivable how terrifying the strength of those ultimate masters who have truly completed the ultimate will be.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian once again knocked the Dongxi Mountain Lord away, and then stopped fighting with him.

He knew that he couldn't kill the Dongxi Mountain Lord, so he still left first.

The Dongxi Mountain Lord continued to chase and kill Ye Tian, but gradually lost Ye Tian's trace.

"Damn, you should do it first!"

The Dongxi Mountain Lord was remorseful, he felt that it was not good for him to take the lead as an ultimate powerhouse, so he had been hesitating, but in the midst of hesitation, Ye Tian made a move and snatched away the incomplete Ultimate Secret Method.

He knew that he was a step late, and he happened to attack and kill Ye Tian, but he couldn't help Ye Tian.

Now, he has also offended Ye Tian, in case Ye Tian breaks through to the ultimate powerhouse, he will be in danger.

......

Shenwei Pavilion, the headquarters of Tianwei Pavilion.

Ye Tian returned, and then immediately announced the retreat.

He began to receive the Incomplete Ultimate Secret Method.

Rumble!!!

Countless pieces of knowledge poured into his mind, and he thoroughly accepted it.

And after receiving the inheritance, this scroll was directly shattered.

【The Ultimate Secret Method - Stellar】

This secret method is very incomplete, but even if it is incomplete, it is still the ultimate secret method, and it is expected to transform the spiritual power of the eighteenth dimension into the ultimate spirit.
